response.justification: The candidate brings well over the required 6 years of full-stack experience with strong, directly relevant work in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB, plus recent hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling development — a rare and explicitly required skill. Demonstrated software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), cloud/container experience (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and a track record of building and maintaining production systems at scale make this a solid fit. Gaps are mostly framework-specific (no explicit Nest.js or Vitest/Playwright, limited Kotlin/Python evidence) and appear learnable given the breadth shown.
strengths: 15+ years full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code-generator work, matching the AI agent requirement
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, built test frameworks, taught testing workshops
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed despite it being the primary backend framework
Kotlin and Python proficiency not demonstrated; Java exposure appears dated
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named, though general testing expertise is strong

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP tooling experience
